CREATE TABLE intervals (id INTEGER, duration INTEGER);
SELECT id, to_seconds(-1 * duration) AS negative_duration FROM intervals WHERE duration < 0;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INTEGER, multiplier INTEGER);
SELECT i.id, to_seconds(i.duration) * a.multiplier AS scaled_duration FROM intervals i JOIN additional_data a ON a.id = i.id;
SELECT id, to_seconds(SUM(duration)) AS total_duration FROM intervals GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN duration < 0 THEN to_seconds(0) ELSE to_seconds(duration) END AS non_negative_duration FROM intervals;
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, to_seconds(duration) AS seconds FROM intervals) SELECT AVG(seconds) FROM temp WHERE seconds > 10;
SELECT i.id, to_seconds(MAX(duration)) FROM intervals i GROUP BY i.id HAVING to_seconds(MAX(duration)) > 30;
SELECT i.id, to_seconds(i.duration) AS duration_in_seconds, a.multiplier FROM intervals i LEFT JOIN additional_data a ON i.id = a.id WHERE a.id IS NULL;
